title: Jubilee Hills ATM Skimming
description: A skimming device was discovered on an ATM in Jubilee Hills after 34 customers reported unauthorised transactions over a 10-day period. Device included a miniature camera aimed at the keypad. Estimated loss of Rs 8.4 lakhs across victims.
modus_operandi: Skimming device planted during low-traffic hours, miniature keypad camera, card data cloned and used within 48 hours of capture.

suspects.description: Male, 5'10", wore helmet inside ATM kiosk to obscure face, planted device

evidence.description: Skimming device with internal SIM card for remote data transmission
ATM camera captured suspect planting device, face hidden by helmet
SIM card IMEI traced to a prepaid number purchased in Secunderabad

blind_spots: SIM card IMEI not traced until day 8
Similar skimming MO reported in Begumpet 3 months prior — not cross-referenced
Bank transaction pattern analysis delayed by 4 days
resolution: IMEI trace led to prepaid SIM buyer. Suspect identified via shop CCTV. Arrested day 21 in Secunderabad.
